title: Debug a job that never runs or always runs
description: Trace rules/only-except evaluation against the pipeline source to find why a job is created or skipped unexpectedly.
body: Steps: 1. Identify the pipeline source (push, merge_request_event, schedule, trigger, tag) for the run in question. 2. Read the job's rules (or only/except) top to bottom and find the first matching clause and its when. 3. Check for a rules/only-except mix (mutually exclusive) or a missing default that drops the job. 4. Use the pipeline editor or a CI lint to preview which jobs the config produces for that ref. 5. Adjust the conditions and re-preview. Rollback point: revert the .gitlab-ci.yml change. Validation: the job appears exactly in the intended pipeline sources and the CI lint confirms it.
